subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #083 The Four Criteria of Comprehension
subcodes.first_line: There are only four accepted criteria of comprehension, that is, four criteria whereby the realities of things are understood.
subcodes.first_line_orig: میزان ادراک آنچه مسلم است منحصر در چهار موازینست یعنی حقائق اشیاء باین چهار چیز ادراک میشود
subcodes.subjects: @limits of the intellect, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @rational arguments, @The Holy Spirit, @four methods of acquiring knowledge
